description: Plugin-distributed hooks for developer-relations. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks when the plugin is installed. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the plugin's install location, not the consumer's project root.

hooks.comment: Flag DevRel anti-patterns on devrel-conventional files: a quickstart with no time-to-first-success target, vanity metrics presented as success criteria, and a talk abstract with no single takeaway. Advisory by default; flip exit 0 to exit 1 to enforce.
